Bodytext.67108945: "Incoming video frames from the first input are cached and indexed according to the frame index coming in on the second input. The second input expects a single channel of the name \"frame_stream\". The third input expects a single channel of the name \"frame_sync\"" "'The SynchroFrameIn component performs the client role of the TDSynchro system. It configures to receive the frame index from the SynchroFrameOut module located on the server computer.  There is one SynchroFrameIn component per client TD application.'"
